full_text:
Han Song (Degao) 韓嵩 (德高)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Song (韓嵩), styledDegao (德高), was born in Nanyang. A tactician to Liu Biao, served as Minister Herald in the Wei state. Han Song was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom. Han Song lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
